message:
test(updater): add comprehensive unit tests for updater module

Add 31 new unit tests covering:
- UpdateChannel: default, display, serialization
- parse_repo: various URL formats, edge cases, error handling
- current_target: format, OS detection, architecture detection
- is_generic_binary: various binary name patterns
- compute_sha256: file hashing, edge cases, error handling
- channel_matches: stable, beta, nightly channel filtering
- UpdateChecker: construction, configuration methods
- ReleaseAsset: serialization/deserialization
- InstallResult: serialization/deserialization
- UpdateDownloader: temp directory management, cleanup
- UpdateInstaller: path configuration, rollback handling

Bead: meta_skill-6av

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
